lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'CDN market valued at $23.5B in 2024, projected to reach $71.7B by 2034. Foundational internet infrastructure, evolving with AI and edge computing.', 'source': 'https://www.factmr.com/report/content-delivery-network-market'}
notes: CDN services for web content acceleration and bandwidth cost reduction; peaked at 40+ vendors in 2001; under 12 survivors by 2004.

tech_name: Mirror Image CAP (Content Access Point) Architecture
lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'Mirror Image Internet was acquired and wound down; the CAP (Content Access Point) proprietary architecture no longer exists as a distinct product.', 'source': 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mirror_Image_Internet'}
notes: CAP = specially designed regional data centers at critical Internet crossroads; combines global delivery with centralized control; reduces infrastructure costs.

tech_name: Mirror Image Smart Content Services Platform
lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'discontinued', 'notes': 'Mirror Image Smart Content Services Platform was a proprietary offering tied to Mirror Image Internet, which was absorbed/wound down in early 2000s.', 'source': 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mirror_Image_Internet'}
notes: New platform combining CAP architecture with XML-based rules engine; supports geotargeting, time-of-day rules, ad rotation, wild-card image replacements.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'evolved', 'notes': 'XML-based content rules engines have evolved into modern policy engines, decision management platforms, and business rules management systems (BRMS). The XML-centric form is largely superseded.', 'source': 'General technology evolution'}
notes: Advanced XML rules engine enabling non-IT groups to manage content delivery without IT involvement; rules distributed throughout CDN.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Streaming media delivery via CDN is a rapidly growing, core technology underpinning OTT, live sports, and VOD markets. Actively evolving with adaptive bitrate and edge computing.', 'source': 'https://adeia.com/blog/industry-perspective-streaming-technology-evolution'}
notes: On-demand and live web casting; audio and video delivery over Internet.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Adaptive caching is central to modern CDN operation; now enhanced with ML/AI for predictive caching. Active area of innovation.', 'source': 'https://www.cachefly.com/news/the-power-of-machine-learning-for-advanced-cdn-caching-strategies/'}
notes: Making on-the-fly content decisions based on how specific content is used in particular regions; central to retailer content personalization.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Geotargeting is widely used in digital advertising and CDN routing. Integrated into all major ad platforms (Google, Meta, LinkedIn). Active and growing.', 'source': 'https://www.aidigital.com/blog/geotargeted-advertising'}
notes: Delivering content based on user geographic location; key CDN feature requested by online advertisers and international retailers.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Distributed web application hosting is a mature, active market. Evolved from dedicated hosting to cloud-native and edge delivery models.', 'source': 'General technology evolution'}
notes: Hosting web applications at origin data centers; CDN overlays reduce load by caching content close to users.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Digital download services remain active across software, media, and gaming. Supplemented (not replaced) by streaming in most sectors.', 'source': 'General market observation'}
notes: Downloadable software delivery via CDN; part of Smart Content delivery service suite.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Using CDN for business continuity/disaster recovery is an established practice, increasingly integrated into enterprise resilience strategies.', 'source': 'General CDN industry'}
notes: CDN as business continuity layer for web availability; regional CAPs provide redundancy.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Traffic filtering and intrusion detection at the CDN/edge layer is a growing, active category (DDoS mitigation, WAF). Cloudflare, Akamai, Fastly all offer this.', 'source': 'General CDN industry'}
notes: Security benefit of CDN: all traffic through CDN network; origin data center never directly hit; reduces IDS burden.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'SLA monitoring and near-real-time reporting is a standard, active practice across all infrastructure and service providers.', 'source': 'General IT operations'}
notes: Custom reporting tool developed for toy retailer: real-time content visibility throughout Mirror Image network; validates SLAs in under 45 days.
